results.rendered_html:
kṛtvya (von 1. kar) adj.
1〉 der Etwas zu leisten vermag, tüchtig; wirksam; vom Rosse  ṚV. 6,1,8 . 9,46,1 . 101,2 . kṛtvyo rasaḥ (vom Soma) 9,76,1 . 77,5 . 84,5 . mada 10,144,2 .
— 2〉 thatenreich; die Kraft anstrengend: kṛtvye dhane  ṚV. 1,54,6 . 8,5,26 .  VĀLAKH. 2,9 . tā me aśvyānāṃ harīṇāṃ nitośanā . uto nu kṛtvyānāṃ nṛvāhasā 8,25,23 . yaddha prabhāsi kṛtvyā~ anu dyūnanarviśe paśvipe turāya 1,121,7 .
